message:
chore(artifacts): add frx_compiler_lane_charter and release_checklist_gate run artifacts

Two new gate verification runs produced by concurrent agents:

- artifacts/release_checklist_gate/20260225T200945Z/: release checklist gate
  run with manifest, events, and commands (3 files)
- artifacts/frx_compiler_lane_charter/20260225T201327Z/: FRX compiler lane
  charter gate run with manifest, events, and commands (3 files)

Both follow the standard timestamped artifact directory structure with
run_manifest.json, events.jsonl, and commands.txt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_compiler_lane_charter
+cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_compiler_lane_charter
+cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_compiler_lane_charter -- -D warnings

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test release_checklist_gate
